headline: Online Hate Speech Reports Rise 65% to 28,000 Cases
context: MCMC received 28,000 online hate speech reports in 2025 a 65% increase driven by racial and religious content.

cards.big: Online hate speech reports rose 65% to 28,000 in 2025
cards.sub: Racial and religious content comprised 72% of reported incidents

cards.big: Action taken on only 4,200 of 28,000 reports due to definitional gaps
cards.sub: Malaysia lacks specific hate speech legislation using general provisions

cards.big: Racial hate speech targeting Chinese and Indian communities rose 45%
cards.sub: Religious content attacking minority Muslim sects increased 38%

cards.big: Platform removal of hate speech in Malay language took average 96 hours
cards.sub: English language hate speech removed 3 times faster at 32 hours

cards.big: Hate speech enforcement tests whether content regulation works equally across languages and communities
28,000 hate speech reports — 65% rise. Online hatred flourishes where platform incentives reward engagement over safety.
